name: Hoka Clifton 9
description: A highly cushioned daily trainer that delivers a soft, balanced ride for easy miles and long runs, featuring a lightweight foam midsole and an engineered mesh upper that prioritizes comfort over speed.

name: Hoka Mach 6
description: A responsive, low-profile neutral trainer built for tempo runs and faster daily efforts, offering a lighter, more grounded feel than the Clifton with a snappy ride that bridges the gap between training and racing.

name: Li-Ning Challenger 5
description: An elite carbon-plated racing shoe designed for speed, featuring Li-Ning's Boom foam technology to deliver maximum energy return and a propulsive toe-off for competitive road racing.

name: Li-Ning Arc Ace
description: A stability-oriented running shoe built on Li-Ning's Arc cushion platform, offering structured support and reliable cushioning for runners who need guidance through their gait cycle.

name: Asics Gel-Kayano 30
description: The flagship stability trainer renowned for its plush, supportive ride, combining high-stack cushioning with Asics' trusted guidance technology to keep overpronators comfortable across high-mileage weeks.

name: Asics Novablast 4
description: A bouncy, energetic neutral daily trainer that uses a trampoline-inspired midsole geometry to create a lively, cushioned ride perfect for runners who want a fun, responsive feel underfoot.

name: Brooks Ghost 15
description: A dependable, no-fuss neutral trainer that offers a smooth, comfortable ride with moderate cushioning, making it an ideal entry point for new runners and a reliable workhorse for everyday miles.

name: Brooks Adrenaline GTS 23
description: A classic stability shoe that pairs GuideRails support with a balanced, medium-cushioned ride, delivering trusted overpronation control without sacrificing comfort on daily training runs.
